=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:17-6:22) TS377008: This uses `yield` for an `Effect` value. `yield*` is the Effect-aware form in this context. effect(missingStarInYieldEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics missingStarInYieldEffectGen:warning
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const preview = Effect.gen(function*() {
  const value = yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  return value
})
